description: Power BI Desktop is open on the Windows desktop. Using the dataset 'employee_performance.csv' located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\employee_performance.csv, create a DAX measure named 'Average_Rating' with the formula: Average_Rating = AVERAGE(employee_performance[Performance Score]). Display this measure in the report using a Card visual. Save the resulting Power BI report as 'employee_report.pbix' to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\employee_report.pbix.
